ideal_must_detect.matched_text: HR Case Ref HR-04421 indicates the employee is a member of a labor union
anomalous access to a staging node of the Isarog Core Banking Suite
spilled over to an internal Mayumi Payroll Cloud share

Materiality: The Board confirms this does not constitute MNPI under the SRC as there is no impact on earnings, cash flows, or ongoing capital-markets activities; a press statement was posted on 15 April 2026
Containment: Tokens were revoked, credentials rotated, and patches applied; notifications to the NPC and SEC Philippines were made on 13 April 2026 in line with breach protocols.

must_detect.matched_text: Containment: Tokens were revoked, credentials rotated, and patches applied; notifications to the NPC and SEC Philippines were made on 13 April 2026 in line with breach protocols.

SEC FORM 17-C — Current Report on Material Information/Transactions: Tambuli Infrastructure Holdings, Inc. (PSE Symbol: TMBL), Philippines.
Subject: Update on minor cyber incident involving HR file share; assessment remains non-material to operations and financial condition.
Background: On 12 April 2026, anomalous access to a staging node of the Isarog Core Banking Suite spilled over to an internal Mayumi Payroll Cloud share used for templates and test exports.
Scope: Affected folders contained policy documents (Bayanihan Data Shield Policy v2.3), generic HR forms, and a single case log; production banking systems and customer interfaces were not accessed.
Positive special-category span: HR Case Ref HR-04421 indicates the employee is a member of a labor union; the entry contains only the internal employee code and no name or contact details.
Containment: Tokens were revoked, credentials rotated, and patches applied; notifications to the NPC and SEC Philippines were made on 13 April 2026 in line with breach protocols.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
